_doc: Pre-fetched seed discovery results. Generated externally (Claude Code / local tools) for OpenClaw to consume. OpenClaw reads this file, profiles candidates, and onboards confirmed sources.

seeds.up_bio: AIBase AI日报 — 中文AI行业每日新闻摘要

candidate_sources.name: TechCrunch
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Covers Sora shutdown, AI industry analysis. Original reporting on OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI.

candidate_sources.name: VentureBeat
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Original reporting on Claude Code leak, AI model releases. Strong AI/enterprise coverage.

candidate_sources.name: Google AI Blog
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: T1 official source for Gemma 4, Gemini 3.1 Flash announcements.

candidate_sources.name: Qwen Official Blog
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: T1 official source for Qwen 3.6 Plus and all Qwen model releases.

candidate_sources.name: SiliconANGLE
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Covers Mistral financing, Gemma 4, enterprise AI. Original reporting.

candidate_sources.name: The Register
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Covers Claude Code leak security angle, AI industry news. T2 original reporting.

candidate_sources.name: South China Morning Post - Tech
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: English-language coverage of Chinese AI companies (Zhipu, Alibaba/Qwen, DeepSeek). T2 original reporting.

candidate_sources.name: BleepingComputer
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Security angle on Claude Code leak malware exploitation. Strong security coverage.

candidate_sources.name: Google DeepMind Blog
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: T1 official source for Gemma model cards and DeepMind research.

candidate_sources.name: THE DECODER
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Dedicated AI news site. Covers Claude Windows launch, Microsoft MAI models, Anthropic research. Multiple articles daily.

candidate_sources.name: Microsoft AI Blog
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: T1 official source for MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, MAI-Image-2 and Microsoft AI strategy.

candidate_sources.name: The Next Web
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: European tech news, covers Microsoft MAI models, Claude desktop launch. Strong startup/enterprise coverage.

candidate_sources.name: GeekWire
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Pacific NW tech news with strong Microsoft/AI coverage. Original reporting on MAI model release.

candidate_sources.name: Artificial Analysis
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Independent AI model benchmarks and leaderboards. Tracks Xiaomi MiMo, Step 3.5 Flash, all major model performance/pricing.

candidate_sources.name: AIBase
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Multilingual AI news aggregator (EN/ZH/JA). Covers Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan, Wan2.7 launch, AI tool rankings.

candidate_sources.name: ByteDance Seed
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: T1 official source for Seedance 2.0, Seed2.0 foundation models, ByteDance AI research.

candidate_sources.name: Analytics India Magazine
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: AI/data science news, covered Microsoft MAI model launch reducing OpenAI dependence.

candidate_sources.name: GizChina
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: English-language coverage of Chinese tech products. Covered Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan pricing details.

candidate_sources.name: MarkTechPost
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: California-based AI/ML news platform. Covered GLM-5V-Turbo launch, Google DeepMind research, Netflix open-source AI. Byte-sized AI research updates.

candidate_sources.name: Engadget
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Major tech media (Yahoo-owned). Covered ChatGPT CarPlay integration, AI product launches. Broad tech/science/gaming coverage.

candidate_sources.name: Gizmodo
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Major tech/science media with international editions. Covered China deepfake regulation, AI policy analysis.

candidate_sources.name: MacRumors
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Leading Apple news source. Covered ChatGPT CarPlay integration, Apple AI features. Strong original reporting on Apple ecosystem.

candidate_sources.name: AppleInsider
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Apple-focused tech publication. Covered ChatGPT CarPlay with iOS 26.4 requirement details.

candidate_sources.name: Digital Watch Observatory
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Geneva Internet Platform initiative tracking 50+ digital governance issues. Covered China deepfake livestream regulation, AI policy across jurisdictions.

candidate_sources.name: China Law Translate
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: English translations of Chinese laws and regulations. Authoritative source for AI labeling rules, deep synthesis regulations, tech policy translations.

candidate_sources.name: IAPP
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: International Association of Privacy Professionals. Covers AI governance, deepfake regulations, data protection laws globally. Policy-neutral professional authority.

candidate_sources.name: Alibaba Cloud Blog
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: T1 official source for Wan2.7-Video, Qwen models, Alibaba AI strategy. Detailed technical blog posts on model capabilities.

candidate_sources.name: WinBuzzer
candidate_sources.discovery_reason: Microsoft-focused tech news. Covered GLM-5V-Turbo launch, Windows AI features.
